creator: viktor.stujber+freebsd-bugs_v4CCPfay@gmail.com
text: This was resolved on 2017-11-30 when the FLAVORS thing was introduced to ports. See https://svnweb.freebsd.org/ports/head/devel/py-subversion/Makefile?limit_changes=0&r1=455210&r2=455209&pathrev=455210 for the exact change. It is essentially the solution I received earlier.
